args: export DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://localhost:5432/cortex}"; export CORTEX_RUNTIME="${CORTEX_RUNTIME:-cli}"; PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; DEPS_DIR="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA:-/tmp/cortex-deps}/deps"; export PYTHONPATH="${PLUGIN_ROOT}:${DEPS_DIR}"; python3 -c 'import psycopg' 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install -q --target "${DEPS_DIR}" "psycopg[binary]>=3.1" "pgvector>=0.3" 2>/dev/null; cd "${PLUGIN_ROOT}" && exec python3 -m mcp_server
